datasheets.heading: Technical Datasheets
datasheets.description: Detailed specifications, pin diagrams, and installation standards for each QS controller model.
datasheets.empty: No datasheets have been published yet.

hero.lede: All of QS Technology's technical documentation — controller-line catalogues, per-model datasheets, operation manuals, the latest firmware, and CAD installation drawings.

items.d: The complete catalogue of all 6 F-series and Astro-series controller lines — Vietnamese and English editions.
Detailed specs per model: I/O, voltage, dimensions, and pin diagrams for servo and inverter connections.
Manuals for operators: HMI operation, parameter setup, and handling common alarms.
The latest firmware for each model, plus DXF/STEP drawings for integration into machine cabinets.

items.title: QS 2026 Full Catalogue
items.desc: All 6 controller lines, application diagrams, a spec comparison table, and included accessories.

items.title: Astro 6AH
items.desc: Pin diagrams, servo specs, mechanical dimensions, and cabinet installation standards.

items.title: Firmware F-series
items.desc: Stable update for F54/F86/F10T with look-ahead improvements and a fix for alarm 27.

plc.heading: PLC documents
plc.body: Some special documents — detailed wiring diagrams, sample ladder source, advanced troubleshooting — are provided exclusively to customers with a technical-service contract.

macro.heading: Macro documents
macro.body: Need a specific document that isn't in the public library — EPLAN drawings, sample G-code, demo videos? The QS technical team will email it within 24 hours.
